title: Maine Judicial Branch — Recent Rule Amendments (incl. Bar Rules)
description: Hosted on courts.maine.gov, not the Board's own site: the Board's site has no rule-change log, but this Judicial Branch page's 'Recent Rule Amendments & Orders' table covers all court rule sets, including the Maine Bar Rules and M.R. Professional Conduct, as they are adopted/amended. Only table on the page. Columns: Order Number (linked PDF) / Rule Set / Rule Numbers / Subject / Effective Date.
